---
title: "AI in Public Health Workshop"

image: "ai_teaching.jpeg"
format:
  html:
    includes:
      in_header: style.css
      before_body: cover.html
---
## Teaching Assistant
<script type="text/javascript">
document.write(`
<!-- Background Image with Gradient Overlay -->
<div id="intro-section" style="position: relative; text-align: center; color: white;">

  <!-- Image with Subtle Teal Gradient -->
  <div style="background: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('ai_teaching.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center; width: 100%; height: 100vh;">
    
    <!-- Text Overlay on the Background Image (Positioned lower within the image) -->
    <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); text-align: center; width: 100%;">
      <h1 style="font-size: 3em; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;">AI in Public Health Workshop</h1>
      <p style="font-size: 1.5em; text-align: center; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">This four-day workshop will provide participants with a practical understanding of how Artificial Intelligence (AI) can be applied to enhance public health activities. Through hands-on activities, case studies, and discussions, participants will learn how to use AI tools to improve disease surveillance, diagnosis, treatment, and overall healthcare delivery. The workshop will run from [dates here].</p>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- Structured Program Details Below the Image -->
<div id="program-details" style="padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9;">
  <h2 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Program Outline & Learning Objectives</h2>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li><strong>Understand:</strong> the basic terminology and concepts of AI</li>
    <li><strong>Evaluate:</strong> potential benefits and challenges of implementing AI in public health</li>
    <li><strong>Analyze:</strong> real-world case studies of AI applications in disease surveillance</li>
    <li><strong>Use:</strong> AI tools (ChatGPT, BARD) to speed up public health data analysis</li>
    <li><strong>Assess:</strong> ethical, legal, and societal implications of AI integration in public health</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Format and Activities</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Interactive lectures and presentations</li>
    <li>Hands-on exercises and practical demonstrations</li>
    <li>Group discussions and case studies</li>
    <li>Guest speakers from the field of AI and public health</li>
    <li>Take-home assignments</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Instructors</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Yogesh Hooda, PhD (Scientist & Lead of Biochemistry, CHRF)</li>
    <li>Senjuti Saha, PhD (Director & Senior Scientist, CHRF)</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Guest Speakers</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Sudipta Saha (PhD Candidate, Harvard University, USA)</li>
    <li>Mark Sun, PhD (Principal Research Scientist, Versant Stealth Startup, Canada)</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Prerequisites</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Basic knowledge of public health concepts and introductory statistics</li>
    <li>Intermediate programming skills in Python/R</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Target Audience</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li>Public health professionals</li>
    <li>Researchers and academics in public health and AI</li>
    <li>Students interested in the intersection of AI and public health</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Schedule</h3>
  <ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0;">
    <li><strong>Day 1:</strong> Introduction to AI (AI concepts, terminology, applications, and hands-on generating AI code)</li>
    <li><strong>Day 2:</strong> AI Applications in Public Health Modeling (Typhoid incidence calculation in Bangladesh, modeling vaccine impact)</li>
    <li><strong>Day 3:</strong> AI in Disease Surveillance (Data sources, data quality, outbreak detection using AI)</li>
    <li><strong>Day 4:</strong> Implementing AI in Public Health and Future Trends (AI in medical image analysis, addressing bias, ethical discussions)</li>
  </ul>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Workshop Duration & Location</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center;">Duration: 4 days <br> Location: CHRF-HQ, Shyamoli, Dhaka, Bangladesh</p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Scholarship and Certification</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center;">This workshop is part of the “Democratizing Public Health Modeling Using AI-based Tools” grant by the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation. Selected candidates will receive scholarships to cover the course fee. All participants will receive a certificate upon successful completion.</p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Apply Now</h3>
  <p style="text-align: center;">
    <a href="https://chrfbd.org/pages/building-scientists-for-bangladesh/program/13c4f00f-6201-42df-885c-dca0e2fb948b" class="btn btn-primary rounded-pill me-2">Program Website</a>
  </p>
</div>
`);
</script>

<style>
  #program-details {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.6;
  }
  
  h2, h3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  
  ul {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    margin: 0 auto;
    max-width: 800px;
  }
  
  li {
    padding: 10px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
  }
  
  a.btn {
    background-color: #007bff;
    color: white;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 25px;
    font-size: 1.2em;
  }
  
  a.btn:hover {
    background-color: #0056b3;
  }
</style>
